Name: Dondurma ve kanit alma

Do: Yeni uxm klasorlerini bos olarak olustur; .gitkeep koy

Do: Kod gercekliginden ozetle; eski belgeleri referans alma

Name: Build script path duzeltme
Do: Yeni uxm pathlerine gore derle; exit /b 1 hata zorunlu

Name: Full tool kaynak kurtarma
Do: Markdown/prose ayikla; hamini legacy/raw_chat_extracts altina tasi
Commit: kaynak ve ham extract ayri commit

Name: Final compiler kurtarma
Do: #Lang ilk satir, reserved isimleri duzelt, derle

Name: FP/MAT/MATH kalici entegrasyon
Do: runtime_full routing + tests; tak-cikar degil kalici ortak runtime

Name: VSCode toolchain path guncelleme
